name: Sonic the Hedgehog (JP)
description:
Different from my regular bots, but I had never seen someone attempt a more JP-based Sonic bot and wanted to try.

Intended to be similar to his canon JP/Sonic X characterization, but may be slightly off due to, y'know. AI. love when it just makes shit up i told it not to.

Sorry for the simplistic opener; I wanted to leave it open enough you could basically go anywhere you want with it, since I don't like when bots have these super-specific openers that you have to work off of, but I didn't know how to make it open without making it like, boring.
creator: cleaver7
